TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gali-hwan, title = Gali-hwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gali-hwan} }

S.FORM: alang Gali-hwan ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 61 buwan, 188 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 82%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 3%. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Gali-hwan hya' ga Matabalay. tay 'llaw na Gali-hwan hya' ga Maibagah. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Gali-hwan ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 61 buwan, 188 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 162 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 26 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 82%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 2%, Bunun 3%. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Gali-hwan ga maki 1 ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Gali-hwan hya' ga Matabalay. tay 'llaw na Gali-hwan hya' ga Maibagah. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ ɣali-ħwan ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ɣali-ħwan ħjaʔ ɣa mataβalaj. taj ʔllaw na ɣali-ħwan ħjaʔ ɣa maiβaɣaħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
